calendar.matters:
DEMURRER to PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Aug-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Niall Vignoles, Esq. 415-848-8180) for Plaintiff.
Robb Kapla, Esq. Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-4647 for Defendant.
Court Reporter: Victoria Thomas, CSr #12927, 559-623-3367, VLthomascsr@gmail.com, Reported. (501)

Argued. Mr. Vignoles contests, argues and requests to amend the tentative ruling.Mr. Vignoles responds to parts in the reply papers and that case should be heard on the merits. The Court reads aloud the tentative ruling and cites dispositive case. Mr. Kapla responds case cannot proceed if is untimely. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND ITS BOARD OF APPEALS, PLANNING DEPARTMENT's DEMURRER to PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION.

SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Govt. Code 65009(c)(1).

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Victoria Thomas, CSR #12927, 559-623-3367, VLthomascsr@gmail.com, Reported. (501)
